name: Titan Strobe 100 FX

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: CB6FA294-316E-11F0-AFEE-42010A37C004

comment:
Titan Strobe 100 FX has a cold white 100-watt COB LED in the center surrounded by 12 individually controllable 2-watt RGBW LEDs. This allows it to produce powerful strobe effects complemented by bright colors. The Fresnel lens ensures a wide beam angle. The Titan Strobe 100 FX can be controlled by DMX, Art-Net and sACN. It also has RDM and can run in Master or Slave mode, as well as having a stand-alone mode with several built-in programs.

With a robust, IP65-rated housing, this versatile light fixture brings powerful strobe and colorful lighting effects to all sorts of indoor and outdoor events. Installation is quick and easy thanks to the included quick-lock bracket and a 12.5 mm hole for attaching the fixture to a clamp.

capabilities.comment: Ramp Up To Ramp Down - Custom
